hero.name: Subhadeep Gorain
hero.subtitle: AI/ML Engineering Portfolio
hero.tagline: Where cutting edge algorithms meet cinematic elegance.

about.name: Subhadeep Gorain
about.subtitle: AI/ML Engineer — Data Science & Machine Learning Engineering
about.p1: An AI/ML Engineer who finds clarity in complexity.
about.p2: Specialising in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Data Engineering. My stack centres on Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost.
about.p3: Pursuing graduate research opportunities in Japan. Currently building end-to-end ML pipelines that go from raw data to deployed inference.

tech.p1: Specialising in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Data Engineering. My stack centres on Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, and XGBoost — tools I use to build systems that see patterns where others see noise.
tech.p2: From engineering demand forecasting models using Japan Tourism Agency data to developing end-to-end classification systems, I build pipelines that go from raw observation to deployed inference. Currently pursuing graduate research opportunities in Japan.

projects.title: Technical Research & Projects
projects.p1_desc: ML forecasting model on Japan Tourism Agency open data. Applied for MEXT scholarship.
projects.p3_desc: Cross-platform note-taking app built with React Native and local storage.

skills.title: Skills & Capabilities
skills.de_2: Feature engineering – lag features, rolling statistics

experience.title: My Journey
experience.jlpt_desc: Studying Japanese toward N3. Pursuing AI/ML career in Japan.
experience.intern_desc: Backend services and REST APIs at an early-stage startup.
experience.sih_desc: National-level engineering hackathon solving real-world problems.
experience.mentor_desc: Supported team practice sessions and managed club activities.
experience.research_desc: ML forecasting model using Japan Tourism data across all 47 prefectures.

contact.p1: Available for freelance, research collaborations, and full-time opportunities.
